ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile number of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Sales, Support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON data of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to this role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to this user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, meeting) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the product manufacturer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Stock level for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_products" (
  "sales_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales-product mapping */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_products_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, update account) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tags" (
  "user_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-tag mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
